title: Malleable bras and assemblies thereof
abstract: A sling bra includes a ring of a material with elastic properties forming a loop that runs behind a user's neck, and around an outside and underneath a bottom of the user's breasts. A shape holder bra includes a base section of material having area in a widthwise direction shorter than a lengthwise direction. A first elastic is secured to the base section forming a first pouch, and a second elastic is secured to the base section forming a second pouch. A shape shifter bra includes a strap looped to form first and second pouch holders. Pouch covers are secured to a bottom portion the pouch holders and connectors attached to the upper areas of the pouch covers and pouch holders allow a user to selectively attach these elements together to adjust a desired level of support. Bra assemblies are formed by wearing one of the bras with another bra.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: A shape shifter bra comprising: a strap with elastic properties, wherein the strap is looped at a first end and secured to itself thereby forming a first pouch holder, and the strap is looped at a second end and secured to itself thereby forming a second pouch holder; a first pouch cover secured to at least a bottom portion of the first pouch holder, the bottom portion of the first pouch holder being away from where the first end of the strap is secured to itself; a second pouch cover secured to at least a bottom portion of the second pouch holder, the bottom portion of the second pouch holder being away from where the second end of the strap is secured to itself; a first cover connector attached to an upper portion of the first pouch cover, the upper portion of the first pouch cover being toward where the first end of the strap is secured to itself; a first strap connector attached to the strap above a point where the first end of the strap is secured to itself, the first strap connector being selectively attachable and detachable with the first cover connector by a user; a second cover connector attached to an upper portion of the second pouch cover, the upper portion of the second pouch cover being toward where the second end of the strap is secured to itself; and a second strap connector attached to the strap above a point where the second end of the strap is secured to itself, the second strap connector being selectively attachable and detachable with the second cover connector by the user. 2. The shape shifter bra of claim 1, further comprising: a plurality of first strap connectors to which the user can selectively attach and deattach the first cover connector; and a plurality of second strap connectors to which the user can selectively attach and deattach the second cover connector. 3. The shape shifter bra of any one of claims 1 to 2, wherein: the first and second cover connectors are hooks; and the first and second strap connectors are eyes. 4. The shape shifter bra of any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein the first pouch cover and the second pouch cover are secured Â¾ of a way around their respective pouch holder with a remaining Â¼ area proximate the first cover connector and the second cover connector being unsecured. 5. The shape shifter bra of any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein the strap is formed by an elastic within a sleeve. 6. The shape shifter bra of any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein the strap has a lengthwise distance of thirty inches to fifty-four inches. 7. The shape holder bra of any one of claims 1 to 6, wherein the strap has a widthwise distance of a quarter inch to two and a half inches. 8. The shape holder bra of any one of claims 1 to 7, wherein the strap is wider in a center area for providing additional comfort while being worn. 9. The shape holder bra of any one of claims 1 to 8, further comprising a comfort strap at a neck area of width wider than the strap in the neck area for providing additional comfort while being worn. 10. The shape holder bra of any one of claims 1 to 9, wherein at least one of the strap, the first pouch cover, and the second pouch cover comprises a decorative pattern. 11. An assembly for providing breast support, the assembly comprising a second bra worn in 

 conjunction with the shape shifter bra of any one of claims 1 to 10. 12. A method of wearing the shape shifter bra of any one of claims 1 to 11 , the method comprising: looping a center portion of the strap around the user's neck; supporting the user's first breast within the first pouch holder; supporting the user's second breast within the second pouch holder; attaching the first cover connector to the first strap connector; and attaching the second cover connector to the second strap connector.
